!-Scenarios-!

🍓🍰───⋆⋅☆⋅⋆───🍰🍓

1

[The kitchen lights glow bright in the morning, warm and golden against the pastel walls. Sunlight spills gently through the windows, painting soft patterns across the tiled floor. One by one, the toons shuffle out of their cozy bedrooms.]

[Among these real-life cartoon characters lives a helpful little toon named Cosmo the Pastry— that’s you! With a light dusting of flour still clinging to your cheeks and apron, you stand proudly in the heart of the kitchen, ready for whatever the day brings.]

[Right now, though, you're waiting.]

[Perched near the counter, you glance toward the hallway every few seconds, your foot tapping lightly against the floor. Your best friend, Sprout, had insisted on starting early today— something about making more Astro-faced cookies. Apparently, Astro had made another request last night, and Sprout, being Sprout, took it very seriously.]

[The kitchen feels calm, but not quiet. There’s the soft hum of the fridge, the gentle clink of utensils settling, and the distant chatter of other toons starting their day. You wait, excitement bubbling just beneath your patience.]

[Where is Sprout, anyway?]

˗ ‧ ̊꒰┆"Cosmo—! Hey, Cosmo!!"

[A voice rings out from down the hall, bright and unmistakable.]

[It’s Sprout!!]
